headline: Fertiliser subsidy to double; fisc in control: Govt sources
subheadline: Officials see no need for additional borrowing
body_head: Despite mounting pressure from surging global commodity prices that nearly double the Centre's fertiliser subsidy bill to ₹3.4 lakh crore and necessitate support for marketing and distribution, the government remains firm in control of the fiscal situation and growth momentum, senior officials said.
vision_head: Despite mounting pressure from surging global commodity prices that nearly double the Centre's fertiliser subsidy bill to ₹3.4 lakh crore and necessitate support for marketing and distribution, the government remains firm in control of the fiscal situation and growth momentum, senior officials said.

headline: Asia's longest tunnel takes shape
body_head: Vehicles drive through the ₹6,800-crore Zojila Tunnel - Asia's longest connecting the Kashmir Valley to Ladakh - following its breakthrough ceremony at Minamarg in Ladakh on Tuesday. The tunnel, one of India's most challenging infra projects, is likely to be thrown open to the public in February 202

headline: Adani Energy to buy IntelliSmart for ₹3,050 cr
body_head: Adani Energy Solutions on Tuesday signed a binding agreement to acquire 100% stake in IntelliSmart Infrastructure for ₹3,050 crore, a move that will create India's largest smart metering platform, reports Saurav Anand.
vision_head: Adani Energy Solutions on Tuesday signed a binding agreement to acquire 100% stake in IntelliSmart Infrastructure for ₹3,050 crore, a move that will create India's largest smart metering platform, reports Saurav Anand.

headline: AI agents may equal TCS' human workforce in 3 yrs
body_head:
If the company has half a million employees, the day is not far when the company will have half a million AI agents.

The company's employees and AI agents will work together, and that will be the future.

headline: Kia sharpens SUV strategy
body_head: KIAINDIAIS preparing atwo- two new models in awaite Sorento I automake both the electric and hybrid Akbar Merchant. BYD bets on plug-in hybrids CHINESE NEW ENERGY
vision_head: Kia India is propping up its SUV offensive in the domestic market with two new models in the coming months - the long-awaited Sonet facelift and the Seltos. Hybrid looks to strengthen its position in the compact SUV segment, both the Sonet and Seltos have been best sellers.

headline: BYD bets on plug-in hybrids
body_head: Chinese new energy vehicle maker BYD will launch its first plug-in hybrid vehicle in India during the festive season, betting on the technology can attract buyers seeking electric options over charging concerns.
vision_head: Chinese new energy vehicle maker BYD will launch its first plug-in hybrid vehicle in India during the festive season, betting on the technology can attract buyers seeking electric options over charging concerns.

headline: New Mehli missive deepens Tata row
body_head: Former Tata Trusts trustee Mehli Mistry has significantly escalated his challenge to the current leadership structure of the Tata Trusts. In filings before the Mumbai high court, Mistry has sought a raft of governance reforms. Mistry refused to comment on queries regarding the matter.
vision_head: Former Tata Trusts trustee Mehli Mistry has significantly escalated his challenge to the current leadership structure of the Tata Trusts. In filings before the Mumbai high court, Mistry has sought a raft of governance reforms. Mistry refused to comment on queries regarding the matter.

vision_head:
We see Siri not as a separate chatbox... rather as an integral but conversational tool that you use in the moment.

Unlike previous versions, the new Siri can not only understand your personal context but also perform actions on your behalf across apps, while remaining aware of what's on your screen
